title: VanillaMINE Modpack
description: Modpack for players on the www.VanillaMINE.sk server. But it can also be used for normal play (or play on another server).
body:
VanillaMINE Modpack
---
Modpack určený pre hráčov na serveri [VanillaMINE](www.vanillamine.sk). Ale je možné ho využiť aj na bežné hranie (poprípade hranie na inom serveri).

Obsahuje nejaké základné módy a resource packy pre príjemnejšie hranie (poprípade ako základ pre vlastný modpack) - módy je možné ľubovoľne vypnúť (vymazať) alebo pridať vlastné.

Modpack obsahuje vyzuálne vylepšenia ako [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Blur+ (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric), [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) ...

Ale aj funkčné módy ako [Inventory Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-essentials), [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) ...

A nejaké optimalizácie ako [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) ...

_Všetky módy a resource packy sú vypísané nižšie_

### Ovládanie

- `X` - Otvorenie enderchestky (/enderchest)
- `Y` - Otvorenie craftingu (/craft)
- `U` - Všetky waypointy
- `J` - Nový waypoint
- `M` - Otvorenie mapy
- `C` - Zoom / `C + Koliesko` - väčší/menší zoom
- `K` - Zapnutie/Vypnute shaderov
- `O` - Menu shaderov
- `ä` - Nastavenie mapy
- `ú` - Nastavenie minimapy

### Verzia 1.21.8
Zatiaľ chýbajúce módy:
- Enhanced Block Entities


<details>
<summary>English description</summary>

Modpack for players on the [VanillaMINE](www.vanillamine.sk) server. But it can also be used for normal play (or play on another server).

It contains some basic mods and resource packs for more enjoyable gameplay (or as a basis for your own modpack) - mods can be turned off (deleted) or added.

The modpack includes visual enhancements like [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Blur+ (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric), [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) ...

But also functional modes like [Inventory Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-essentials), [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) ...

And some optimizations like [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) ...

_All mods and resource packs are listed below_

### Controls

- `X` - Open enderchest (/enderchest)
- `Y` - Open crafting (/craft)
- `U` - All waypoints
- `J` - New waypoint
- `M` - Open map
- `C` - Zoom / `C + Wheel` - zoom in/out
- `K` - Turn shaders on/off
- `O` - Shader menu
- `ä` - Map settings
- `ú` - Minemap setting

### Version 1.21.8
So far missing mods:
- Enhanced Block Entities

</details>


---
